Interface IceCreamable

All Known Implementing Classes:
Cone, SlicedBread
public interface IceCreamable
Interface for ingredient that can be used as an ice cream holder which can be interacted with using Ice Cream Machine.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addIceCream(IceCreamFlavor flavor)
    Set ice cream flavor of IceCreamable ingredient.
    IceCreamFlavor
    getIceCreamFlavor()
    Get ingredient's ice cream flavor.

  • Method Details

    • addIceCream

      void addIceCream(IceCreamFlavor flavor)
      Set ice cream flavor of IceCreamable ingredient. Will not set if ingredient already contained ice cream.
      Parameters:
      flavor - Ice cream flavor to be set

    • getIceCreamFlavor

      IceCreamFlavor getIceCreamFlavor()
      Get ingredient's ice cream flavor.
      Returns:
      Ice cream flavor.
